patch_plan.task: Ensure there are exactly 2 IfcBuildingStorey with different Elevation values, and every IfcSpace is contained in exactly one of these storeys via IfcRelContainedInSpatialStructure.

evidence.problem: No tool-returned proof of exactly-2-storey structure and complete space assignment.

patch_plan.task: Create exactly 8 IfcSpace and assign 4 to each storey using IfcRelContainedInSpatialStructure (storey.ContainsElements).
Give every IfcSpace a closed IfcSweptSolid/IfcFacetedBrep body representation and attach a quantity (e.g., Qto_SpaceBaseQuantities.NetFloorArea) or ensure geometry supports robust area calculation.

evidence.problem: No tool-returned confirmation of closed solids and net floor area > 0 for every space.

patch_plan.task: Ensure each IfcSpace profile/footprint is a simple closed polygon (no self-intersections) and the resulting 3D solid is valid (no self-intersections).
Place Level 2 spaces with z-min above (or equal to) Level 2 storey elevation and ensure Level 1 spaces do not extend above Level 2 elevation; prevent any space from spanning both storeys.

evidence.problem: No tool-returned z-extent vs elevation checks.

patch_plan.task: Model the roof as two planar sloped faces meeting at a single straight ridge line (gable). Avoid hip facets and avoid horizontal roof faces.

evidence.problem: No tool-returned geometric proof of gable topology (2 planes + ridge).

patch_plan.task: Center the gable ridge in plan over the footprint; align ridge midpoint to footprint centroid within 10% of max footprint dimension.
Ensure exterior wall axis endpoints meet (within 0.02m) in a closed loop around Level 1 spaces; fix gaps by adjusting wall endpoints/placements.

evidence.problem: No tool-returned endpoint gap metric for exterior perimeter continuity.

patch_plan.task: Ensure all walls/slabs/roof have positive thickness and valid solids so computed volume > 0 (no zero-thickness extrusions).

evidence.problem: No tool-returned positive volume verification across elements.

patch_plan.task: Remove/repair any circular placement references; ensure all IfcLocalPlacement chains resolve to finite transforms (no NaN/Inf).
